sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67693" key="mikko/trwgos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικκότρωγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n67693.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eating little</tr_>, name of a parasite in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plaut.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Stich.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">242</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
